Container.Name: immich-gpt
Container.Overview:
AI-first metadata enrichment and organisation for Immich.
Immich GPT connects to your existing Immich photo server, classifies every asset with an AI vision model (OpenAI, Ollama, or OpenRouter), and lets you review and write AI-generated descriptions, tags, and album assignments back to Immich — all from a clean web UI.
Single-container — no Redis, no separate worker process required. All jobs run in-process using a lightweight thread pool.
Container.Requires: A running Immich instance reachable from this container. An OpenAI API key OR a locally-running Ollama instance.

Config.Name: Web UI Port
Config.Description: Port for the Immich GPT web interface. Change Host port only; keep container port at 8000.

Config.Name: Data Directory
Config.Description: Persistent storage for the SQLite database. All settings, job history, and AI suggestions are stored here. Back this up.

Config.Name: Immich URL
Config.Description: Full URL of your Immich server. Must be reachable from inside Docker (use your LAN IP, not localhost). Example: http://192.168.1.100:2283

Config.Name: Immich API Key
Config.Description: Immich API key. Create one in Immich → Account Settings → API Keys. You can also set this in the web UI after first launch.

Config.Name: OpenAI API Key
Config.Description: OpenAI API key for GPT-4o vision classification. Leave blank if using Ollama or OpenRouter instead. Configure providers inside the web UI → Settings.

Config.Name: OpenAI Model
Config.Description: Default OpenAI model. Only used when OPENAI_API_KEY is set and no provider has been configured in the UI. gpt-4o-mini is cheaper; gpt-4o is more accurate.

Config.Name: Worker Threads
Config.Description: Number of background job threads (sync + classification). 2 is enough for most home servers. Increase if you have many assets and a fast AI provider.

Config.Name: Redis URL
Config.Description: Leave blank to use the built-in thread-pool worker (recommended for Unraid). Set to redis://host:6379/0 only if you run a separate Redis container and want distributed workers.

Config.Name: Enable Auth
Config.Description: Set to true to require a Bearer token on all API calls. You must also set SECRET_KEY. Useful when exposing Immich GPT to the internet via a reverse proxy.

Config.Name: Secret Key
Config.Description: Bearer token / secret used for auth when AUTH_ENABLED=true. Generate a strong random string. No effect when AUTH_ENABLED=false.
